name: Aussie Spiced Chicken & Crispy Potatoes
headline: Top recipes from HelloFresh markets around the world
description: In honor of this year’s summer games, we bring you a gold medal winner of our own! From HF Australia, these juicy spice-crusted chicken cutlets are savory and just a little spicy. You’ll roast them beside smashed potatoes that crisp up perfectly in a hot oven. Serve it all with a lightly dressed mixed green salad and creamy truffle mayo for dipping like a champ!
